datasets.name: ds_census_current
queryLines: SELECT department, location_facility, total_arrivals, total_discharges, estimated_census, snapshot_at FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_department_census_current ORDER BY department, location_facility

datasets.name: ds_census_ed_total
queryLines: SELECT SUM(estimated_census) AS ed_census, SUM(total_arrivals) AS ed_arrivals, SUM(total_discharges) AS ed_discharges FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_department_census_current WHERE department = 'ED'

datasets.name: ds_census_icu_total
queryLines: SELECT SUM(estimated_census) AS icu_census, SUM(total_arrivals) AS icu_arrivals, SUM(total_discharges) AS icu_discharges FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_department_census_current WHERE department = 'ICU'

datasets.name: ds_census_total
queryLines: SELECT SUM(estimated_census) AS total_census FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_department_census_current

datasets.name: ds_ed_hourly
queryLines: SELECT event_hour, location_facility, arrivals, discharges, net_change, hour_of_day, day_of_week, is_weekend FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_ed_hourly_census ORDER BY event_hour

datasets.name: ds_icu_hourly
queryLines: SELECT event_hour, location_facility, arrivals, discharges, net_change, hour_of_day, day_of_week, is_weekend FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_icu_hourly_census ORDER BY event_hour

datasets.name: ds_ed_hourly_agg
queryLines: SELECT event_hour, SUM(arrivals) AS arrivals, SUM(discharges) AS discharges, SUM(net_change) AS net_change FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_ed_hourly_census GROUP BY event_hour ORDER BY event_hour

datasets.name: ds_icu_hourly_agg
queryLines: SELECT event_hour, SUM(arrivals) AS arrivals, SUM(discharges) AS discharges, SUM(net_change) AS net_change FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_icu_hourly_census GROUP BY event_hour ORDER BY event_hour

datasets.name: ds_ed_daily
queryLines: SELECT activity_date, location_facility, total_encounters, total_arrivals, total_discharges, unique_patients, ROUND(CAST(avg_los_minutes AS DOUBLE), 1) AS avg_los_minutes, peak_arrival_hour, unique_providers FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_ed_daily_summary ORDER BY activity_date

datasets.name: ds_icu_daily
queryLines: SELECT activity_date, location_facility, total_encounters, total_arrivals, total_discharges, unique_patients, ROUND(CAST(avg_los_hours AS DOUBLE), 1) AS avg_los_hours, beds_used, peak_arrival_hour, unique_providers FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_icu_daily_summary ORDER BY activity_date

datasets.name: ds_ed_daily_agg
queryLines: SELECT activity_date, SUM(total_arrivals) AS total_arrivals, SUM(total_discharges) AS total_discharges, SUM(unique_patients) AS unique_patients, ROUND(AVG(CAST(avg_los_minutes AS DOUBLE)), 1) AS avg_los_minutes FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_ed_daily_summary GROUP BY activity_date ORDER BY activity_date

datasets.name: ds_icu_daily_agg
queryLines: SELECT activity_date, SUM(total_arrivals) AS total_arrivals, SUM(total_discharges) AS total_discharges, SUM(unique_patients) AS unique_patients, ROUND(AVG(CAST(avg_los_hours AS DOUBLE)), 1) AS avg_los_hours, SUM(beds_used) AS beds_used FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_icu_daily_summary GROUP BY activity_date ORDER BY activity_date

datasets.name: ds_ed_hourly_pattern
datasets.displayName: ED Hourly Pattern by Day of Week
queryLines: SELECT day_of_week, hour_of_day, ROUND(AVG(arrivals), 1) AS avg_arrivals FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_ed_hourly_census GROUP BY day_of_week, hour_of_day ORDER BY day_of_week, hour_of_day

datasets.name: ds_ed_vs_icu_daily
queryLines: SELECT COALESCE(e.activity_date, i.activity_date) AS activity_date, COALESCE(e.ed_arrivals, 0) AS ed_arrivals, COALESCE(e.ed_discharges, 0) AS ed_discharges, COALESCE(i.icu_arrivals, 0) AS icu_arrivals, COALESCE(i.icu_discharges, 0) AS icu_discharges FROM (SELECT activity_date, SUM(total_arrivals) AS ed_arrivals, SUM(total_discharges) AS ed_discharges FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_ed_daily_summary GROUP BY activity_date) e FULL OUTER JOIN (SELECT activity_date, SUM(total_arrivals) AS icu_arrivals, SUM(total_discharges) AS icu_discharges FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_icu_daily_summary GROUP BY activity_date) i ON e.activity_date = i.activity_date ORDER BY activity_date

datasets.name: ds_ed_avg_daily_arrivals
queryLines: SELECT ROUND(AVG(total_arrivals), 1) AS avg_daily_arrivals FROM (SELECT activity_date, SUM(total_arrivals) AS total_arrivals FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_ed_daily_summary GROUP BY activity_date)

datasets.name: ds_icu_avg_daily_arrivals
queryLines: SELECT ROUND(AVG(total_arrivals), 1) AS avg_daily_arrivals FROM (SELECT activity_date, SUM(total_arrivals) AS total_arrivals FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_icu_daily_summary GROUP BY activity_date)

datasets.name: ds_ed_avg_los
queryLines: SELECT ROUND(AVG(CAST(avg_los_minutes AS DOUBLE)), 1) AS avg_los_minutes FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_ed_daily_summary WHERE avg_los_minutes IS NOT NULL

datasets.name: ds_icu_avg_los
queryLines: SELECT ROUND(AVG(CAST(avg_los_hours AS DOUBLE)), 1) AS avg_los_hours FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_icu_daily_summary WHERE avg_los_hours IS NOT NULL

datasets.name: ds_combined_features
queryLines: SELECT event_hour, ed_arrivals, ed_discharges, ed_net_change, icu_arrivals, icu_discharges, icu_net_change, total_arrivals, total_discharges, ROUND(ed_to_icu_ratio, 2) AS ed_to_icu_ratio, net_system_pressure, hour_of_day, day_of_week, is_weekend, ROUND(ed_arrivals_rolling_24h, 1) AS ed_arrivals_rolling_24h, ROUND(icu_arrivals_rolling_24h, 1) AS icu_arrivals_rolling_24h, ROUND(ed_discharges_rolling_24h, 1) AS ed_discharges_rolling_24h, ROUND(icu_discharges_rolling_24h, 1) AS icu_discharges_rolling_24h FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_combined_forecast_features ORDER BY event_hour

datasets.name: ds_combined_latest
queryLines: SELECT net_system_pressure, ROUND(ed_to_icu_ratio, 2) AS ed_to_icu_ratio, total_arrivals, total_discharges FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_combined_forecast_features ORDER BY event_hour DESC LIMIT 1

datasets.name: ds_combined_pressure
queryLines: SELECT event_hour, ed_arrivals, icu_arrivals, ed_discharges, icu_discharges, net_system_pressure FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_combined_forecast_features ORDER BY event_hour

datasets.name: ds_combined_ratio
datasets.displayName: ED to ICU Ratio Over Time
queryLines: SELECT event_hour, ROUND(ed_to_icu_ratio, 2) AS ed_to_icu_ratio FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_combined_forecast_features WHERE ed_to_icu_ratio IS NOT NULL ORDER BY event_hour

datasets.name: ds_combined_rolling
queryLines: SELECT event_hour, ROUND(ed_arrivals_rolling_24h, 1) AS ed_arrivals_24h, ROUND(icu_arrivals_rolling_24h, 1) AS icu_arrivals_24h, ROUND(ed_discharges_rolling_24h, 1) AS ed_discharges_24h, ROUND(icu_discharges_rolling_24h, 1) AS icu_discharges_24h FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_combined_forecast_features WHERE ed_arrivals_rolling_24h IS NOT NULL ORDER BY event_hour

datasets.name: ds_ed_features_heatmap
queryLines: SELECT DATE(event_hour) AS event_date, HOUR(event_hour) AS hour_of_day, SUM(arrivals) AS arrivals FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_ed_forecast_features GROUP BY DATE(event_hour), HOUR(event_hour) ORDER BY event_date, hour_of_day

datasets.name: ds_icu_features_heatmap
queryLines: SELECT DATE(event_hour) AS event_date, HOUR(event_hour) AS hour_of_day, SUM(arrivals) AS arrivals FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_icu_forecast_features GROUP BY DATE(event_hour), HOUR(event_hour) ORDER BY event_date, hour_of_day

datasets.name: ds_data_freshness
queryLines: SELECT MAX(last_message_at) AS latest_message, MAX(processing_hour) AS latest_processing_hour, COUNT(*) AS total_metric_rows FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_message_metrics

datasets.name: ds_msg_throughput
queryLines: SELECT processing_hour, SUM(message_count) AS total_messages, SUM(unique_messages) AS total_unique, COUNT(DISTINCT message_type) AS message_types, COUNT(DISTINCT sending_facility) AS facilities FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_message_metrics GROUP BY processing_hour ORDER BY processing_hour

datasets.name: ds_msg_by_type
queryLines: SELECT message_type, SUM(message_count) AS total_messages, SUM(unique_messages) AS total_unique FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_message_metrics GROUP BY message_type ORDER BY total_messages DESC

datasets.name: ds_msg_by_facility
queryLines: SELECT sending_facility, SUM(message_count) AS total_messages, SUM(unique_messages) AS total_unique FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_message_metrics GROUP BY sending_facility ORDER BY total_messages DESC

datasets.name: ds_patient_activity
queryLines: SELECT activity_date, location_facility, patient_class_desc, unique_patients, encounter_count, unique_providers FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_patient_activity ORDER BY activity_date

datasets.name: ds_patient_activity_by_class
queryLines: SELECT patient_class_desc, SUM(encounter_count) AS total_encounters, SUM(unique_patients) AS total_patients, SUM(unique_providers) AS total_providers FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_patient_activity GROUP BY patient_class_desc ORDER BY total_encounters DESC

datasets.name: ds_patient_activity_by_facility
queryLines: SELECT location_facility, SUM(encounter_count) AS total_encounters, SUM(unique_patients) AS total_patients FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_patient_activity GROUP BY location_facility ORDER BY total_encounters DESC

datasets.name: ds_patient_activity_daily
queryLines: SELECT activity_date, patient_class_desc, SUM(encounter_count) AS encounter_count FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_patient_activity GROUP BY activity_date, patient_class_desc ORDER BY activity_date

datasets.name: ds_total_messages_ops
queryLines: SELECT SUM(message_count) AS total_messages FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_message_metrics

datasets.name: ds_total_unique_msgs
queryLines: SELECT SUM(unique_messages) AS total_unique FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_message_metrics

datasets.name: ds_msg_hours_covered
queryLines: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT processing_hour) AS hours_covered FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_message_metrics
